name: Hearthvale Atelier
summary: Cozy Fabric 1.20.1 building and homestead pack: warm cottages, village upgrades, farms, kitchens, storage rooms, bridges, gardens, scenic countryside exploration, and shader-ready visuals with Iris.

shader_recommendations: Iris-compatible light-to-medium cozy shaderpack (manual install if safe auto-acquisition unavailable)
notes: Iris and Sodium are mandatory core visual foundation. Optional mods are marked required=false and are first candidates for stabilization trimming if runtime issues occur.
